answer_summary: Vegas rot is sneaky because everybody assumes dry climate means dry wood. What actually happens is repeated wetting at the same trim ends, garage legs, or sill corners
speakable_summary: Vegas rot is sneaky because everybody assumes dry climate means dry wood. What actually happens is repeated wetting at the same trim ends, garage legs, or sill corners
